assay_test_type: Type of biological test conducted (in vivo, in vitro, etc.).
doc_id: Document identifier related to the assay.
assay_tax_id: Taxonomic identifier of the organism used in the assay.
assay_strain: Specific strain of the organism used in the assay.
description: Detailed description of the assay and its objectives.
cell_id: Identifier for the cell type used in the assay.
chembl_id: Unique identifier for chemical compounds in ChEMBL database.
assay_subcellular_fraction: Subcellular location where the assay was conducted.
assay_organism: Species in which the assay was performed.
assay_cell_type: Type of cell used in the assay.
variant_id: Identifier for genetic variants, if applicable (data not provided).
assay_type: Type of assay conducted (B for binding, F for functional).
assay_category: Category of the assay (data not provided).
assay_tissue: Tissue in which the assay was performed.
